name: Assistant chat
description: The full conversation screen: reasoning, a tool call, a streaming reply with sources and actions, starter prompts, and the composer.

name: Voice mode
description: A fullscreen listening surface on a drifting aurora: the orb, a live waveform, and mute and done controls.

name: Personalize
description: Onboarding for a companion: pick a style from aura tiles, set the conversation tone, grant permissions, and create.

name: Agent dashboard
description: A working session at a glance: your agents, a live plan with a running tool, focus for the day, and a proactive nudge.

name: Agent run
description: A single run up close: the plan advancing, a live tool call, streaming findings, and pause and stop controls.

name: Sidebar layout
description: The full app shell: an icon-collapsible sidebar with chats and a group action, and a conversation in the inset.

name: Login
description: A quiet sign-in card with the orb, email and password, and GitHub.

name: Sign up
description: Account creation ending in the gradient create button.
